category_sources: source_facts.description expands CIVL as Concurrency Intermediate Verification Language; official CIVL pages describe it as a verifier for concurrent programs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides civl; source_facts.description expands the acronym as CIVL.
docs_sources: Official CIVL manual PDF is hosted under the same vsl.cis.udel.edu CIVL software path.
source_facts.homepage is the official University of Delaware CIVL site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no official source-control repository URL was provided in source_facts, and the official distribution is a release archive under source_facts.source-archive.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies CIVL; official CIVL documentation describes verification of concurrent programs.
